## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated under `tests/`, and `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies in the core engine (stdlib + `git`/`gh` only)
- [ ] Stays repo-, language-, and host-agnostic (no hardcoded paths/orgs/hosts)
- [ ] Still read-only - does not modify the target repo's working tree or the PR
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated if behavior changed
